title: The grief when AI writes most of the code
summary: 当人工智能编写几乎所有代码时，软件工程会发生什么？ 对于我们开发人员来说，这是肯定的。
summary_en: When AI writes almost all code, what happens to software engineering? There is grief involved for us developers, that's for sure.
